summary: A brief post recommending adblockers to eliminate distracting website advertising. The author notes they've been free from ads for 2-3 years thanks to browser extensions, and encourages readers to adopt the same approach. Two specific adblocker tools are recommended along with a comparison resource.
key_points: Adblockers eliminate the distraction of website advertising
The author has used adblockers for 2-3 years without issues
Two recommended tools: Adblock Plus and AdBlock
money_quotes: I was a bit confused at first because I didn't have that problem the last 2-3 years I think.
You will look confused as I when you hear about advertising on web pages the next time because there isn't anymore.
key_insight: Adblockers are a simple solution that makes web advertising a non-issue you'll eventually forget exists.
